title: Claude Code AI SEO: How to Rank #1 with Claude Code
summary: Julian Goldie presents an agentic SEO system that integrates Claude Code with a user's own Google Search Console data to identify rankable keywords and automatically generate and deploy SEO content across multiple sites. The approach bypasses common keyword tools to find less competitive opportunities, with a demonstrated case of increasing site traffic from 2 to 200+ daily clicks.
writeup: The video demonstrates an agentic SEO system that connects Claude Code to a site owner's own Google Search Console data to surface rankable keywords, then generates and deploys content across multiple sites automatically. It matters because the workflow draws on first-party Search Console data rather than third-party keyword tools, which the video frames as a way to find less competitive opportunities. The central takeaways: Claude Code can run keyword research, content generation, and deployment as a connected pipeline, and the demonstrated case raised one site from 2 to 200+ daily clicks.
